name: Brute Force Credential Attack
description: Repeated authentication failures followed by a successful login — classic brute force or credential stuffing pattern.

name: Privilege Escalation Chain
description: Login followed by privilege change and file access — attacker gained access and immediately escalated permissions.

name: Reconnaissance and Exploitation
description: Port scanning followed by IDS alert and authentication attempt — attacker profiled the target before striking.

name: Data Exfiltration Pattern
description: Bulk file access followed by abnormal outbound network transfer — potential data theft in progress.

name: Malware Execution Pattern
description: Suspicious process started, files modified, then outbound connection — consistent with malware establishing persistence and calling home.
